note: Aliases: definedname. Name rules from ECMA-376 §18.2.5 — start with letter/underscore/backslash, only letters/digits/underscore/period/backslash, must not look like a cell ref. refersTo content must not start with '='.

name.description: defined-name identifier. Required (or inferred from path).

ref.description: refersTo expression. Aliases: refersTo, formula. Do not include leading '='.

scope.description: sheet name for local scope, or 'workbook' (default).

comment.description: free-text description shown in Excel's Name Manager.

volatile.description: force recalculation of the defined name on every workbook change (Excel volatile flag).
